textByHash.0095e9a93f1a6a5f57297fb9b534d625d9849bfe: Let me know if you need anything else.
textByHash.07c7fc7cfb33e439a59d8ea968e4ba61ade76c68: Its lucky I had a scribe make a few copies then, is it not?
textByHash.07e045abce21079210a5f4880f4f100833a1b3c5: I've done many terrible things, but none of them were a mistake. Every sacrifice I've made has been for her, for Seren.
textByHash.0842ddf790dfe7b65b47f47749c2c511435f947c: She just needed time, time to understand, time to overcome her pain. She was our goddess, the last hope for our people. And now, she's gone, because of you.
textByHash.084cc74d4155335ff1e79e5c362d4615c941fe30: You have some nerve to lecture me. Remind me, how many of your people died under your watch? How many fell, trying to free your wife?
textByHash.09b0dc5744a8b346c92143feb252ded7cf057978: Lied? I told your friend here that King Tyras was an invader into our lands. Last time I checked, that was the truth.
textByHash.09b72d566812e5401cea67f37d19305ac5942578: Really? So why did you come then?
textByHash.11c46138106e1dc2094da96447cca45dc9a9a318: Good. Come find me when you've located the camp.
textByHash.15b8dddefe06bcc16a1038d8cb4aae6726c7ba86: I have this book here which details an explosive reaction. We should be able to use it to create a bomb.
textByHash.1992f5a7d6f9c33f1f4e9d26ea9edbcc029cbfb9: I will keep my promise to you Arianwyn, you should not doubt that.
textByHash.1b219d1b0aa4a5a8116fba70f4d291b38fafcbe4: I'm sure you will want to get back to your king and tell him. He will undoubtedly want some proof. He should trust me enough in this matter, Give him this letter, it verifies that the job is done.
textByHash.1b2d03c7dd03ba8a38f96c75c8a19541dda0cd58: These new followers of yours, do they know? Do they know what you did? Do they know about the monster you truly are?
textByHash.1c83fa0507a8b1e40c9bfc3131b6e0f67a4ebc38: Anyway, is there anything else I can help with?
textByHash.1d22f3f54c251f02139ca068b145037698ad6630: Don't be so sure. They may not know it yet, but the rebels could be of great use to us...
textByHash.1dce67a560f8f8ea2fcaf0a1ee928d9459ad9f67: I'm sure you will find something at his old camp that can help you.
textByHash.23d20e375c5e1d0a4b9305c8d74ac68c42711936: Let them go. Let it be known that the Iorwerth clan is not without mercy.
textByHash.25500d1d85d98f10f93de4d8dff46e95cbfd318b: We can stand here going around in circles all day, you won't change my mind.
textByHash.27a3909c35dd56ad66d93038e69f9cd1c77e4c76: I hope you can live with yourself...
textByHash.292726a707d750b52fbb4958de6a504b8df6a7e6: No. You never really were a king though were you? A king doesn't abandon his people like you did.
textByHash.31fd01af2c9961fc1562a9493ebc4a10babf0ea8: I can see why you'd think that, but you are mistaken. You're right to say that the temple is key to summoning a god, but that god is not Zamorak, it's Seren.
textByHash.33fd63268b33a3a50eedbba894b79ebcdf2277e8: Good day . Have you had any luck with that book?
textByHash.3657e57760675f6900f4bd470652ad7c94b2ab86: Some sort of fabric should work. You can use the loom here if needed.
textByHash.3c6bfc2920988d07db98e2200ba2fc5c3e8df709: Good day . How may I help you now?
textByHash.42cd710311fddd90b0b2e49b7c6306865dec4b0e: Indeed. Have a read through and see what you think. Once you have, let me know if you have any questions.
textByHash.46cd87a846923b3d6f6553c06945c56b8997ca18: She was confused, she was hurt. Yes, she was angry, but she was innocent!
textByHash.4a778391a29d4fbc61397d94ccae489ca4e669e8: Well your ability to disappoint is one of your few talents, so I'll let it slide. However, I must insist that you give me the orb.
textByHash.4bf11e6bcb7e2e0f05eff5ee1fe05d3639cd7049: I feared as much. That said, I do have someone here who might change your mind.
textByHash.4d5d80227c6db976889125794d5ba240b952d2a9: Well you should be able to get some coal tar from that poisoned lake to the south. As for the rest, I'm afraid I don't have the chemistry knowledge to understand it.
textByHash.52b3731d1ea36306c257640638029b73cb35f439: I thought the same once. That was until I managed to break one of the seals within the Grand Library.
textByHash.5679fbd4db2f70df0329b59f0112b99697c36983: Yes, Arianwyn told me what you discovered in the library. It matters not though, that is a part of our goddess in there, we have to free her.
textByHash.58005ee77096b5cf75715e649bb40896b5df5051: A shame. You're better than this Arianwyn, I hope in time you will see that.
textByHash.5b81160f698c776a736c44a23aa09db076cfdf16: Whereas he, he only ever cared for himself.
textByHash.5e718925727125efa915ebf55be422def0652aff: That's how I discovered the truth. A part of Seren lives on, trapped within the Temple of Light.
textByHash.5f165325e10c25f2416339318f49557ceedea5c7: Tyras and his men have used catapults against us in the past. Maybe you can turn one of them against him.
textByHash.66e4e66abc300ade54f6936de4355c371681dc3d: I think we're done here then. For what it's worth, I'm sorry it had to end this way.
textByHash.6741a934ff2f9dfdbcfd0a21333d4d7e422ef727: This is it, this is what we've spent the last thousand years fighting for. Today, it will finally all be worth it.
textByHash.693773844ef57bc32ecb654a141d335d3859e536: Unfortunately, most of my troops are currently dealing with a group of renegade elves. That does mean we're a bit more limited than we otherwise would be.
textByHash.6aa4e34212d64d8616a0836ab19fd9fcaaf2885a: I know what we agreed Arianwyn! We agreed to free our goddess, and that's what I'm going to do!
textByHash.6bee21a1f20961604d41a0f75dff483a96a27338: Perfect! Take the book to her and see if she can help. Just don't tell her what it's for. Even if she's trustworthy, we can't take any risks.
textByHash.6d64154f9f3ba0013d0b6640f9e80438e5f946a8: A shame. As unlikely as it was, I did hope you might see reason.
textByHash.6d80785218781c4cdea880a71e289891f37fc5c9: My loyalty is to Seren, I will let her decide what is evil.
textByHash.7193f61836523e6932b3ddb31d2e7c56b1aae26d: Ahh... . Welcome to Tirannwn. I understand you've been sent here to rid us of that criminal Tyras. I offer my full support.
textByHash.7584960416675d5326f8e69b0aadaa6a2657f15c: Is there anything else I can help with?
textByHash.767f764f97a7004f6b63dca37b29f3380fd00e4e: What have I done? Well I told him the truth. It was about time that someone did.
textByHash.771b6a9b15e1ee59db4bc3ab950bad7ad918abe6: As for me, I'm many things, and I admit, a lot of them aren't good. But I would never throw lives away like you did.
textByHash.7960a53217462d3bfe1ae0805d916e4012fc4e63: No... of course they don't. You're a liar and a coward, that's all you've ever been.
textByHash.8284ea076de77e7a9d6dfc4cbdfd505a6d47f48b: Now, I suggest you leave, before I change my mind.
textByHash.82f25ada2e1a5cc647ca5e060a7706d3e0cab90c: When I first discovered the truth, our clan was still ruled by my mother. I went to her, told her what I'd found, told her what we needed to do.
textByHash.82fb4a960f605fe30e0f93fcc83a5315379fd6a2: Indeed. Now, Tyras and his forces moved camp recently so your first step will be to find their new camp. I have a tracker currently working in that area. I suggest you join up with him.
textByHash.837862ef8e88532df592eb2df58034bc379aad8b: Sorry, can't stop to talk. So much to do, so little time.
textByHash.892eee00b44229168afb8e528b997d929f5874a9: Have a look around the camp, there should be some empty barrels lying around.
textByHash.899e1bcd9ea78f708d8e6e14c515759199acf99b: I loved my mother, but she was blindly loyal to this fool here, she wouldn't have any of it. I couldn't just abandon my goddess though, she needed us. So I did what had to be done.
textByHash.8be4880d36545af71e80e3a225a73395c5da1173: Now you'd better get going. Don't forget, you'll need a tinderbox to light that fuse. Return to me once the deed is done.
textByHash.8d13128cbb7fd280b85f071b8bc82d4145090eb4: And I would do it again without hesitation. For Seren, there is no price too great.
textByHash.8e69f2dd56c308a721b4fcf0e0ac7fdf7277431a: No, you'll be spotted by the guards if you try that. You'll need to get it in from outside.
textByHash.9061a52c56005dba608e8ed885f1c6301505571c: In the hope that I might still change yours. I don't want anyone else to die in this war. I give you the chance to stand down.
textByHash.94e5b36a6df3bdaa6f63bdb32e2a2dacbb8a6145: I did what I needed to do to save our goddess. No one would have needed to die had you not forced our hand.
textByHash.9990155a42f64de8e9fce4c59f21040c326962f2: It was just a ruse I'm afraid. A lie we told King Lathas to get him on our side.
textByHash.9c7fd3c2249f4c1d3fb12d528395bd005fa38377: Good day Have you had any luck with that book?
textByHash.a12b7be89083f3f0c9350acfa8452c8564616a2c: Ah, I see. There's a mine directly east of here where you can mine limestone.
textByHash.a2b5307f4f9f3ad80642d98605ff3b419fe25cec: Ah, I see you have been led astray. You think we are the evil ones, but our cause is the true one. You think we are murderers, but we are in fact saviours.
textByHash.a536da65f42e035fcf0d4d55abfabac99a85b516: I do. I have done many unspeakable things, things that haunt me every day. But what I did, I did for the good of my people.
textByHash.aab6c5d039d9a065fb18bf2317a45629757ea417: Yes. But make no mistake Arianwyn, if you and your rebels interfere with our affairs again, I will not be so forgiving.
textByHash.aae376276d368aea691f3a3d3d5177574512c2dc: Bless his loyalty but curse his suspicion. Here he will recognise this.
textByHash.ab1154db274bdd96e16c67a11af1986efd3a886d: Instead, I give you a choice. Give me the orb, and I will withdraw my forces, leaving you in peace. Refuse, and the blood of those citizens will be on your hands.
textByHash.abb0faf5d0c34b864774ecac20fc3597bd190d48: We enter the temple, free our goddess and with her by our side, reform the city of Prifddinas.
textByHash.abd1c1a0b54655614783534b7aae15e18f7ca269: Good good... One of my scouts reported that they saw his tent in a ball of flames. You have done well.
textByHash.ac2ddcde1584e01446496df6ed586303ccf186fa: how goes your search... Any luck hunting down that brigand?
textByHash.b28d5abce47fdcf3e964fc0067bf901808686bef: You think you're the hero of this story, but you're not...
textByHash.b5fbaa01d81cce1f9996af8f9c758ec795bc1d24: Check the shore south of the old camp you were at earlier. I've seen sulphur there in the past, it comes from that poisoned lake.
textByHash.b869d5dc833b36676dee2aefd71117b81a46d542: Well lucky for us, we have a way of finding out.
textByHash.b9413f33882ba68af4856fd4d5e3abeaa1bbf703: Of course it's her! Don't tell me you believe Baxtorian and his lies?
textByHash.bb8f17c9d3c8f0397f030b63163c53f4a7149b7d: I'll make this simple for you, Baxtorian. The life of the boy is now in your hands. Give me the orb, and no harm will come to him.
textByHash.bc6305fdcd14f53102c66300a6d354bcb56d9789: Go on, deny it. Just like you always do.
textByHash.bdf276e23c8d63453440cfd9c29a210380fd49cc: As we speak, my forces are dealing with the last of your rebels and rounding up your citizens. You have no way to fight, and nowhere to run.
textByHash.c6084c032363a093c2ef262c631c6ccfd428a7af: There is no time for delay, he'll need to see it.
textByHash.c7a031062cb82f56af5b7dc9cb0b5fd490e5a560: Good job. As we don't have the troops available to take on his forces directly, I suggest we try some alternative tactics.
textByHash.c8113159298e3830bba50256261965039e09c918: They may still be of use to us. Lock them away for now. Give them time to think on their choices.
textByHash.ca392bfe0635a84f34b043b648ed5bb092420a08: Well well, the great King Baxtorian. I wasn't sure I believed it when I heard you were still alive, but here you are.
textByHash.ca41b749fb79a11687ffaa56e595ad1db9b20377: Brave of you to come here Arianwyn, but foolish. We have you outnumbered.
textByHash.d0805ff1d1a1abb6a079f80fb94c26d5c18f64b8: How? With violence? That's all you know isn't it?
textByHash.d4d6cfad83897bc71b3f1812037b2e341671be4b: A wise choice, must be a first for you.
textByHash.d918cc3251a7ea117578491e02445e2eba34c8cd: Ah, that. Well now that King Lathas is dead, I suppose there's no better time to reveal the truth.
textByHash.d941ac8aec6ccc7a6aa97a4a1f0c23b8fda13dbe: You'll find him at Tyras's old camp. It's south east of here, just north of that poisoned lake. Once you've found the camp, come and let me know.
textByHash.d99b222cc9f04f6d490bc04a0440d90a0744255f: We needed access to West Ardougne so we needed the support of the king. Once we found out about his hidden worship of Zamorak, it seemed like an obvious lie to tell.
textByHash.dacbfafdc8e06ed6625efefd1204c565ab244519: , how goes your search? Any luck hunting down that brigand?
textByHash.db5960abd53745ac5823c2f0bf219a23497f8fce: Oh I will, one way or another. But in case it wasn't clear, let me explain the situation.
textByHash.e54fe615814ba0e91e798a2dd33b3cd07dbe747b: You talk sense human, and yet you stand beside the warmonger himself.
textByHash.ea09acf6c0a084b78ec2aa470838f7cf599a8387: I have no more love for Zamorak than you do. I've only ever served one god, the same one as you, Seren.
textByHash.ebaedb9159633ca8e9b2632648e30beb78fce15e: No? You seemed more than happy to kill King Tyras when it suited you. Burnt him alive in the middle of his own camp if I recall.
textByHash.eced7983b9ffd8454ad69133aa074fb00b506b62: Have you delivered the message to King Lathas yet?
textByHash.ef6406b097d0ab5d111e54eded73ef682d742a8c: So you finally decided to show your true colours, how disappointing.
textByHash.efaa18a40a59fb405f3019188a262326aeb92699: Everything we have done, every sacrifice we have made, all of it has been to free our goddess.
textByHash.f0463abeaa292d043bcc2935690215b06c512d96: No one else needs to die here. Please, just give me the orb. Do that, and I swear we will do you no further harm.
textByHash.f0aeb7740fb211e68b2182d5253fafd731e8289d: Now, I'm afraid I'll need to push you on a decision.
textByHash.f34038715d05230e2ecc34dd7cab5627f7a140a3: Perhaps, but I don't believe you're the type to throw lives away without need. Instead, why don't we discuss this like reasonable people.
textByHash.f6003d278c2934ddf38afbeb259de1ae839584cc: As a token of my own thanks, I give you access to the pass through Arandar. You'll find the start of the trail in the far north east of the woods.
textByHash.f6d95e8f26a590fee78bc537a31ce2f50654e978: You know, after you killed King Tyras, I thought you might have some potential. Given time, we might have properly welcomed you into our ranks. You'd have been the first human among us.
textByHash.f7318a6d27c7d02067a08eebf0bd92180be7f425: Of course, I could just have you all killed right now. After the trouble you've all caused me, it wouldn't be an unreasonable act. However, I am not without mercy, and I will not draw blood unless I have to.
textByHash.fa2c6dc715083ab9768353c4b9dd30687645347c: Here have another copy, but don't let it fall into the wrong hands.
textByHash.fa6baca0b88502b01a685c93db9133d8580c0089: Time can change a lot of things, perhaps Seren has changed as well.
textByHash.fa7727f27fbcb0c88f3458d20a7f1c58f04c778e: Excellent work. Now we can finally deal with Tyras.
textByHash.fb23ba41ec8be12a694c2787099abcec01b07642: No, I wouldn't. But the choice is not mine, it's yours. I will count to five.
textByHash.fc4ad2647e9638554ed36c727cf35bbd706c9d12: Enough of this! You can try to manipulate him all you want, he's made his choice.
textByHash.fc70d3aa8181e398e2674f23ec4588afab51ed3b: I see. I did hope it wouldn't come to this, but you've given me no choice. Morvran.
textByHash.fce9325a3185ad7dc09be75266d549477d17f8c1: Zamorakian? You don't really think we'd support that monster do you? I'm afraid to say that you're quite mistaken.
